title: Standalone Maps Search results are NOT in IDAP — read /jobs/{id}/results
summary: IDAP's normalized businesses records are written by the campaign / lead-chain path (campaign_service + workflow_orchestrator), not by a standalone spiderMaps job. A standalone Maps Search run stores its businesses in jobs.results (read via GET /jobs/{job_id}/results) and a dual-write to the results table with campaign_id=NULL — it never populates the IDAP businesses table. So GET /idap/businesses for a Maps Search job_id returns nothing. The lead chain uses IDAP; standalone Maps Search uses the job results endpoint.
references: app/api/v1/jobs/worker_callbacks.py:649-688 — spiderMaps dual-writes to the results table; campaign_id resolves to NULL for a standalone job
app/api/v1/jobs/worker_callbacks.py:113-114 — standalone spiderMaps completion only bumps total_spider_maps_jobs (no IDAP businesses ingest)
app/services/campaign_service.py / app/services/workflow_orchestrator.py — the only writers of IDAP businesses (campaign / workflow path)
